g.title: Chiralogy
g.text: Chiralogy dependency graph. Regenerated by `lake exe depgraph`, do not edit.
Band = stratum (kernel bottom, model, protocol lateral, register top).
Colour = modality (blue forced, orange conditional, grey na). Shape = kind (diamond axiom, ellipse theorem, box def/structure). Cluster = axis (inter-cross, inter-categorical, intra, na).
